name: Lecanemab
summary: Amyloid-beta protofibril monoclonal antibody with phase 3 early-Alzheimer's evidence for amyloid lowering and modest slowing of decline.
mechanism_summary: Binds soluble amyloid-beta protofibrils and lowers brain amyloid burden in amyloid-positive early Alzheimer's disease.

open_questions: Whether amyloid lowering produces durable functional benefit beyond early Alzheimer's disease populations
How to balance modest clinical slowing against ARIA and infusion burden
